message:
🐛 Fix: Daily Issues & PRs respects central repo selection (#8573)

* 🐛 fix: wire IssueActivityChart to shared pipeline filter

Daily Issues & PRs card now reads usePipelineFilter() so it respects
the central repo selection on /ci-cd. Falls back to per-card config
then DEFAULT_REPO when no shared filter is present.

Also adds a shared RepoInput component for future per-card repo
input UI across all CI/CD cards.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 💾 ci-cd: persist repo selection across refreshes and restarts

The active repo selection (which repos are filtered) now saves to
localStorage (kc-pipeline-selection). Previously it reset to 'All'
on every page reload. Added repos were already persisted — now the
selection is too.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 fix: wire GitHubActivity to shared pipeline filter

GitHub Activity card now reads usePipelineFilter() so it respects
the central repo selection on /ci-cd. Falls back to per-card repo
selection (which already has inline CRUD — add/remove/switch repos
via the gear icon). This per-card CRUD pattern is the model for
wiring the remaining cards.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ import ReactECharts from 'echarts-for-react'
 import { Calendar, RefreshCw, GitPullRequest } from 'lucide-react'
 import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
 import { Skeleton } from '../ui/Skeleton'
+import { usePipelineFilter } from './pipelines/PipelineFilterContext'
 import { Button } from '../ui/Button'
 import { useDemoMode } from '../../hooks/useDemoMode'
 import { useCardLoadingState } from './CardDataContext'
@@ -262,7 +263,8 @@ async function fetchIssueStats(
 export function IssueActivityChart(props: { config?: IssueActivityConfig }) {
   const { t } = useTranslation('cards')
   const { isDemoMode } = useDemoMode()
-  const repo = props.config?.repo || DEFAULT_REPO
+  const shared = usePipelineFilter()
+  const repo = shared?.repoFilter || props.config?.repo || DEFAULT_REPO
   const initialDays = props.config?.days || DEFAULT_LOOKBACK_DAYS
 
   const [days, setDays] = useState(initialDays)

@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@ +/** + * RepoInput — shared owner/repo text input for CI/CD cards. + * + * Used both as a standalone per-card repo selector (on non-CI/CD dashboards) + * and alongside the central PipelineFilterProvider (on /ci-cd where the + * shared filter takes precedence). + * + * Accepts any valid owner/repo slug or GitHub URL (reuses normalizeRepoInput + * from the ACMM provider). Persists the user's choice so it survives page + * reloads. + */ + +import { useState, useRef } from 'react' +import { X } from 'lucide-react' +import { normalizeRepoInput } from '../../acmm/ACMMProvider' + +const REPO_RE = /^[\w.-]+\/[\w.-]+$/ + +interface RepoInputProps { + /** Current effective repo (from shared filter or local state) */ + value: string + /** Called when the user submits a new repo */ + onChange: (repo: string) => void + /** Placeholder text */ + placeholder?: string + /** Additional class names */ + className?: string +} + +export function RepoInput({ value, onChange, placeholder, className }: RepoInputProps) { + const [input, setInput] = useState(value) + const [error, setError] = useState(null) + const inputRef = useRef(null) + + function submit() { + const normalized = normalizeRepoInput(input) + if (!normalized) { + setError('Enter owner/repo') + return + } + if (!REPO_RE.test(normalized)) { + setError('Invalid — use owner/repo') + return + } + setError(null) + if (normalized !== input) setInput(normalized) + onChange(normalized) + } + + return ( +
+
+
+ { setInput(e.target.value); setError(null) }} + onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && submit()} + onBlur={submit} + placeholder={placeholder || 'owner/repo or github.com URL'} + className="w-full text-xs font-mono bg-background/60 border border-border/50 rounded px-2 py-1 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary/50" + /> + {input && input !== value && ( + + )} +
+
+ {error && ( +
{error}
+ )} +
